project.name: DevKey
project.description: Open-source Android keyboard combining power-user features with modern UX, AI prediction, and command-aware autocorrect

current_phase.name: Kotlin Migration — Fully Complete + Code Review
current_phase.details: All migration phases + deferred items complete. Multi-wave code review with all P0/P1/P2/P3 fixes applied. Only JNI bridge BinaryDictionary.java remains as Java. 355 unit tests pass.

active_blockers: Whisper model files (whisper-tiny.en.tflite + filters_vocab_en.bin) need to be downloaded
Debug logging system (DevKeyPress/DevKeyMap) not producing output on emulator

metadata.session_notes: Session 24: Implemented 5 deferred migration items (ComposeSequence→Kotlin, Settings Unification, Handler→coroutines, Bridge simplification, ComposeSequencing removal). Multi-wave code review: 120 findings across 4 Opus reviewers, all P0/P1/P2/P3 fixes applied (~81 total fixes). 355 tests pass.
